pi_items.source: The prompt assigns the role of County Property Assessor. A property assessor is an appraiser (SOC 13-2020), not a court/municipal clerk (SOC 43-4031).
Task role of County Property Assessor aligns with local government administration.
The $739M figure appears completely fabricated for the prompt and cannot be sourced to any real metric for property assessors.
Task instructions require view transformations (UNPIVOT/LISTAGG) and bulk modification of the assessments table via MERGE.
Verifier strictly enforces the use of MERGE, UNPIVOT, LISTAGG, and Window Functions (including PERCENTILE_CONT) by parsing SQL views/history.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for oracle_sql_developer_env property_assessment_equalization task by confirming that the Oracle database records (Properties, Assessments, Sales) are synthetically generated and dynamically injected via setup scripts. Verified that the expected required Oracle features (MERGE, UNPIVOT, LISTAGG, PERCENTILE_CONT) explicitly match the task description and verifier.py logic. Discovered that the claimed occupation "Court, Municipal, and License Clerks" contradicts the task's explicit "County Property Assessor" role, and the $739M GDP contribution claim is entirely fabricated.
